arts.ttl: Gabriel Out for Arsenal vs. Manchester United With Injury
arts.sum: Arsenal will be without one of its star center backs against Manchester United.

arts.ttl: New Man City 115 charges final verdict update as Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham watch on
arts.sum: With the trial approaching its final days in the expected 10-week timeline, Premier League barristers Andrew Hunter KC and Adam Lewis KC of Blackstone Chambers were captured outside that location on Wednesday after closing statements., as per the Mail . Manchester City have reportedly begun closing statements in their trial against the Premier League over 115 alleged financial breaches.

arts.ttl: Why Lisandro Martinez and Kobbie Mainoo Aren't Playing vs. Arsenal
arts.sum: Lisandro Martínez and Kobbie Mainoo are both suspended for Manchester United's match against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal, Man United confirm XIs for Premier League showdown at the Emirates Stadium
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United confirm their teams for Wednesday night's Premier League clash at the Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Forgotten Man United star starts first Premier League game in 18 MONTHS - as Red Devils face Arsenal in crunch clash
arts.sum: Manchester United have been named their starting line-up for their crunch clash against Arsenal at the Emirates, with head coach Ruben Amorim handing a defender a first league start in 18 months.

arts.ttl: Man Utd told deal for 'new Modric' almost done
arts.sum: In addition to Real Madrid, the 21-year-old has been linked with Barcelona and Man Utd, who were recently said to be getting'serious' over the potential signing of him. Indeed, Baturina has even been nicknamed the 'next Modric' but he actually turned down a move to Real Madrid recently, if reports are to be believed.

arts.ttl: Manchester United scraps rainbow jackets after Mazraoui cites religious objections
arts.sum: Defender declines to wear jacket supporting LGBTQ+ community on the grounds of his Muslim faith Manchester United shelved plans to wear pride-themed rainbow jackets supporting the LGBTQ+ community after a player refused to take part, citing his religious beliefs. Plans to wear the Adidas tops as they walked onto the pitch during last Sunday’s Premier League match against Everton were abandoned after defender Noussair Mazraoui said he would not be able to wear the jacket on the grounds of his Muslim faith, according to The Athletic. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Liverpool, Arsenal v Manchester United, and more – Premier League clockwatch live
arts.sum: Manchester City face Nottingham Forest, Southampton take on Chelsea, Everton host Wolves and Aston Villa play Brentford. Follow it all live Pep G and Man City host Nottingham Forest There is pressure on the City manager. If his team don’t emerge victorious tonight then Pep will have gone eight games without a win. That’s eight fingers! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arsenal rival Man Utd for in-form Premier League ace
arts.sum: CaughtOffside claims that Arsenal are among the clubs with an interest in Wolves star Matheus Cunha, who has been prominently linked with Man Utd . Arsenal have joined the race for Matheus Cunha, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's secret four-word banner on wall at training ground that fans will love
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta and Arsenal are well known for their unique training ground nuances, but one banner in particular that adorns London Colney appears to be bearing fruit
